input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.4.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.4.3
            TITLE: if a vehicle stalls on the track, it will be allowed one lap by the vehicle that is following it

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.4.3: If a vehicle stalls on the track, it will be allowed one lap by the vehicle that is following it
D.12.4.3 If a vehicle stalls on the track, it will be allowed one lap by the vehicle that is following it 
(approximately 60 seconds) to restart.   This time counts toward the Endurance time.

final_answer: rule D.12.4.3: If a vehicle stalls on the track, it will be allowed one lap by the vehicle that is following it D.12.4.3 If a vehicle stalls on the track, it will be allowed one lap by the vehicle that is following it (approximately 60 seconds) to restart. This time counts toward the Endurance time.
